g.text: Red Pulsing Line : FSYNC / I/O Hardware Barrier

ol.li: Write-Ahead Logging (WAL): The JE_COMMIT_MARKER must be flushed via fsync before the Apply Phase begins.
Metadata Integrity: If a crash occurs after Commit but before Apply, the recovery daemon replays TXN 0x4A2.
Idempotency: All bd.persist operations are address-stable and safe to repeat.
